title: Experts
subtitle: Create a new expert to route specific channels to a separate personality or workspace
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Expert/channel changes may take a moment to apply.
cardDescription: Handles focused chat tasks with channel bindings and a dedicated model

createDialog.title: Add Expert
createDialog.description: Create a new expert by name. You can optionally inherit the main expert's workspace bootstrap files
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: For example: Summarize product reviews, competitors, and operations notes
createDialog.inheritWorkspaceDescription: Copy SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc. from the main expert

deleteDialog.title: Delete Expert
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from BoostClaw? This permanently deletes the expert and its BoostClaw-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the expert name and manage which channels belong to this expert
settingsDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this expert is best at
settingsDialog.modelProviderEmpty: No provider accounts configured. Add one in Settings → AI Providers
settingsDialog.modelOverrideDescription: Select provider and model ID for this expert.
settingsDialog.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you close now, your changes will be discarded
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: This list is read-only. Manage channel accounts and bindings in the Channels page
settingsDialog.channelsManagedInChannels: This expert is linked to channel types. Manage exact account bindings in the Channels page
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this expert yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from BoostClaw? This deletes the current channel configuration

toast.agentModelInvalid: Model must be in provider/model format
